scripts.build:wasm: cargo build --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && mkdir -p pkg && cp backend/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/spacefaring_news_backend.wasm pkg/backend.wasm
scripts.ingest:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply spacefaring-news --local --config wrangler.ingest.toml
scripts.preview:pages: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist --port 8788 --compatibility-date=2026-06-10
